hooks.prompt: Before finishing, verify: (1) Were all tasks in the TodoList completed? (2) Were tests run after code changes? (3) Was TASKS.md updated if an objective was completed? Reply {"ok": true} if all good, or {"ok": false, "reason": "what was missed"} if something was forgotten.

hooks.command: bash -c 'CMD=$(echo $CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT | jq -r .command 2>/dev/null); case "$CMD" in *"rm -rf /"*|*"--force"*|*"--no-verify"*|*"push --force"*|*"reset --hard"*) echo "BLOCKED: dangerous command detected" >&2; exit 2;; *) exit 0;; esac'
